name: TestFRILCalculateChecksum
title: TestFRILCalculateChecksum
syntax: long TestFRILCalculateChecksum (char pduNamme[], long type, BYTE payload[], long payloadLength, BYTE crc []);
description: Calculates the corresponding CRC checksum based on the payload. The correct offset is calculated from the database using the PDU name.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
